_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Medical Invoice

app.name: Medical Invoice
app.description: Medical Invoice - Generate professional medical bills, prescriptions, and healthcare invoices offline

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Generate professional medical bills and healthcare invoices entirely offline.
features: Create itemised medical bills with treatments, procedures, and medicines
Add doctor details, patient info, and clinic branding to every invoice
Works 100% offline — all billing data stays private on your device

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the default currency for medical billing and treatment charges.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local invoices, billing records, and settings completely.

mobile.name: Medical Invoice (Mobile)
mobile.description: Professional medical billing and invoice generation optimized for mobile screens.

tablet.name: Medical Invoice (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive medical invoices and healthcare billing optimized for tablets.

desktop.name: Medical Invoice (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive medical invoices and healthcare billing optimized for desktop.

pdf.csvShareText: Medical Invoice data exported as CSV

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Medical Invoice needs camera access to scan prescriptions, documents, or clinic letterheads.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Medical Invoice needs photo library access to attach medical reports or clinic logos.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Medical Invoice needs microphone access when using the camera.
